text:
After you say the word cat, I'll tell you a short story.

There once was a young girl named Lily. Every morning after breakfast, she would explore the dense forest near her town. One particular day, as she wandered deeper, she came upon an old, gnarled oak tree. She noticed something hanging below the branch where a cat-like creature could perch.

Curiosity piqued, Lily called out to the little creature. The creature vanished into darkness. Moments later, it popped back out, purring loudly.

"Lily? Can you help me?" it said.

Lily nodded. The cat moved gracefully to the branch. "I lost my whiskers. Do you know where they're attached?"

Illuminated by the moonlight, the creature inspected near Lily's ankle. Sure enough! A couple of tiny black buttons.

With excitement, the cat took the missing whiskers and said, "Thank you! You're a true friend."

Lily couldn't stop laughing
